Text_OnlySkilledTrainersAllowedThrough.label: Text_OnlySkilledTrainersAllowedThrough
Text_OnlySkilledTrainersAllowedThrough.raw_text: Only truly skilled TRAINERS are\nallowed through.\pYou don't have the {STR_VAR_1}\nyet!$

Only truly skilled TRAINERS are
allowed through.

You don't have the {STR_VAR_1}
yet!

Text_CantLetYouPass.label: Text_CantLetYouPass
Text_CantLetYouPass.raw_text: Rules are rules.\nI can't let you pass.$

Rules are rules.
I can't let you pass.

Text_OnlyPassWithBadgeDontHaveYet.raw_text:
You can pass here only if you have
the {STR_VAR_1}.\pYou don't have the {STR_VAR_1}
yet.\pYou have to have it to get to
the POKéMON LEAGUE.$
